title: Moody's (MCO) Reports Q3 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Moody's (MCO) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended September 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Moody's Corporation (MCO) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 25, 2023 11:30 AM ET Company Participants Shivani Kak – Head, IR Rob Fauber - President, CEO & Director Caroline Sullivan - Interim CFO Conference Call Participants Heather Balsky – Bank of America Merrill Lynch Faiza Alwy - Deutsche Bank Alexander Kramm - UBS Shlomo Rosenbaum - Stifel, Nicolaus & Company Craig Huber - Huber Research Partners Russell Quelch - Redburn Scott Wurtzel - Wolfe Research Owen Lau - Oppenheimer Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets George Tong - Goldman Sachs Group Andrew Nicholas - William Blair & Company Seth Weber - Wells Fargo Securities Manav Patnaik - Barclays Bank Ryan Griffin - BMO Capital Markets Jeffrey Meuler - Robert W. Baird & Co. Toni Kaplan - Morgan Stanley Andrew Steinerman - JPMorgan Chase & Co. Operator Good day, everyone, and welcome to the Moody's Corporation Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Moody's stock rises on earnings beat as bond issuance rebounds
text: Moody's Corp.'s stock MCO, +5.22% rose 3.3% after the company beat its third-quarter earnings and revenue targets on a rebound in debt issuance. Moody's said it earned $2.43 a share in the quarter, well ahead of the FactSet consensus of $2.30 a share.

title: Moody's (MCO) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Moody's (MCO) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.43 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.35 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.85 per share a year ago.

title: Moody's (MCO) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Costs Up
text: A decent rise in global bond issuance volume and a solid demand for analytics aid Moody's (MCO) Q3 earnings, while higher expenses act as a spoilsport.

title: Moody's Corporation Reports Results for Third Quarter 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) today announced results for the third quarter 2023, as well as updated its outlook for full year 2023. The Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and other earnings materials can be found on the Moody's IR website at ir.moodys.com. In addition, the Earnings Release will be furnished with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on a Form 8-K and will be available on the SEC website at www.sec.gov. “Moody's achieved impressive double-di.

title: Moody's to use generative AI to assist with credit risk reporting
text: Moody's Corporation, one of the big three rating agencies alongside S&P and Fitch, will soon start using artificial intelligence-based large-language models courtesy of Google to assist with its company analysis. In an interview with Bloomberg, chief product officer Nick Reed said that Google LLMs will used to analyse the mountains of data in the public domain and Moody's' own resources that go into the firm's analysis.

title: Decent Global Bond Issuances to Aid Moody's (MCO) Q3 Earnings
text: Improvement in global bond issuance volume and a steady rise in demand for analytics are expected to have supported Moody's (MCO) Q3 earnings.

title: Moody's and Google Cloud Partner on Generative AI Applications Tailored for Financial Services Professionals
text: New tools will aim to streamline the ability of finance professionals to analyze lengthy financial reports and disclosures using Google Cloud's generative AI  NEW YORK and SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Oct. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) and Google Cloud today announced a new strategic partnership to explore bringing together Moody's expertise in financial analysis and Google Cloud's advanced generative AI (gen AI) technologies to help Moody's customers and employees leverage new large language models (LLMs) to glean new financial insights and summarize financial data faster.

title: DATE SET FOR MOODY'S EARNINGS RELEASE AND INVESTOR TELECONFERENCE
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will release its third quarter 2023 results before the start of NYSE trading on Wednesday, October 25, 2023. A copy of the earnings release and supplemental presentation slides will be posted on Moody's Investor Relations website, ir.moodys.com. Moody's Corporation invites you to participate in a teleconference with Rob Fauber, President and Chief Executive Officer and Caroline Sullivan, Interim Chief Financial Officer and Chief Account.

title: 5 Top Buffett Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Long Haul
text: Buffett's investing track record speaks for itself. Berkshire Hathaway owns several technology stocks, some of which go back decades.

title: Warren Buffett's portfolio up 60% in 5 years: Here are the biggest winners
text: At 93 years of age, Warren Buffett remains a stalwart in the world of investing, earning recognition as one of the most successful stock investors in history.
